arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham speaks out on Real Madrid 'bust-up' claims before Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: England midfielder insists there is no disharmony within the ranks ahead of huge Champions League quarter-final comeback bid

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta calls up 'skilful' Arsenal U18s midfielder who's 'very good at breaking up play' to pre-Real Madrid training
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has been putting his players through their paces ahead of Wednesday’s Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid. Arsenal are...

arts.ttl: Second leg a night that's made for Real Madrid - Bellingham
arts.sum: Midfielder Jude Bellingham believes the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final against Arsenal on Wednesday is "a night made for Real Madrid".

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “If we want to complete the comeback, nobody is allowed to mess up”
arts.sum: Ancelotti explained why weird things happen there in the following way: “Because Real Madrid has all the resources to come back: quality, commitment, experience, fans - the resources are there. But, more than spectacular, what Real Madrid wants is to play effective football .”

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham's 'nailed on' Real Madrid admission proves size of task still facing Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal take a 3-0 lead to Madrid as they prepare for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final with holders Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta causes Arsenal mayhem before Real Madrid as Thomas Partey leaves late injury worry
arts.sum: After a quick chat with Ethan Nwaneri at the start of the session, when players were still getting themselves out into the drizzly north London air, Arteta was right into the action. It is with this possibility and opportunity that a group of potential heroes and immortals took to a final training session before the match.

arts.ttl: Liverpool star’s father responds to Real Madrid links
arts.sum: The father of Liverpool star Alexis Mac Allister has this week spoken out on the speculation linking his son with a potential transfer to Real Madrid. The name of midfielder…

arts.ttl: Will Thomas Partey start vs Real Madrid? Arsenal injury latest after Mikel Arteta update
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will need Thomas Partey at full capacity for Arsenal's Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid if he is deemed fit enough to start. "It looks like it [was a rib injury], so I don't exactly know," Arteta said.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham reveals one thing Arsenal did that surprised Real Madrid in Champions League loss
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has admitted that Declan Rice's free-kick double was the only thing that surprised Real Madrid in their 3-0 Champions League defeat to Arsenal. Speaking ahead of the second leg tie between the sides in Spain, Bellingham revealed that he had never seen his England teammate produce something like that with free-kicks before.

arts.ttl: Arsenal line-ups vs Real Madrid as Saka and Partey start, White decision made
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI vs Real Madrid: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Merino, Martinelli. Doyle's Arsenal XI vs Real Madrid: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Martinelli, Merino.
